Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DANIEL MITCHELL'S MOTION TO COMPEL: 1) FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES [SET ONE]; 2) MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $3040.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF.
Appearances: Beau Richard Burbidge of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6693) for plaintiff and responding party; Daniel L. Mitchell of the Law Offices of Daniel L. Mitchell (510.864.8885) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. Order re: June 23, 2011 motion to strike signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
---
After hearing the court ruled as follows: motion to compel is denied. Sanctions of $3040, previously stayed from July 19, 2011, are now permanently stayed. Counsel notified of the court's ruling by telephone on August 3, 2011. Mr. Burbidge is directed to submit a proposed form of order.
